name: RushDB
description: Self-hosted RushDB platform service. Requires an external Neo4j or Aura instance.

RUSHDB_PASSWORD.description: Admin password for the RushDB dashboard.

RUSHDB_AES_256_ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: Exactly 32 characters. Do not change after first boot without migrating encrypted data.

RUSHDB_DASHBOARD_URL.description: Public Heroku app URL, for example https://your-app.herokuapp.com.

RUSHDB_BASE_URL.description: Public Heroku app URL, for example https://your-app.herokuapp.com.

NEO4J_URL.description: External Neo4j Bolt URL. Use neo4j+s:// for Aura.

RUSHDB_LLM_API_KEY.description: OpenAI-compatible API key for relationship suggestions.

RUSHDB_EMBEDDING_API_KEY.description: OpenAI-compatible API key for embedding indexes.
